payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: So as you guys all watch this dark-furred tabaxi giving this big, strong hug around Mollymauk's shoulders. Pulls away and looks at you and goes, "It has been too long, two ye--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Fucking insight check on Taliesin! No, I'm kidding.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Two years! (laughs) Look at you! You grew out your hair!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Fucking insight check on Taliesin! No, I'm kidding.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So as you guys all watch this dark-furred tabaxi giving this big, strong hug around Mollymauk's shoulders. Pulls away and looks at you and goes, "It has been too long, two ye--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Far too long!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Unfortunately, Jurrel met with the axe of the law shortly after you left us."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That is a story for another day and another drink. What did you see? God, I don't know what that looked like from the other end of things. MATT "Well, it all went belly up two years ago. You told us to scatter and vanish if it didn't-- if things went wrong and wait until you returned. We buried your ass in the woods outside of the hideout, I mean-- "

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It may not have necessarily been my ass that you buried.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Apparently."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I had a few tricks up my sleeve.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) "Well, that spell-spitter lady from the capital. She said you were gone, she took the book and left, and her contract said she was in the right and that we knew better than to go toe to toe with her and her ilk."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Obviously. Is everybody else all right? I know it has been a while. I had to stay underground.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Much better down here. Speaking of which, a round please!" The bartender, looking a bit frightened on the side, starts filling tankards. "All right, so. What brings such esteemed adventurers to my pocket of the underworld?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Humbly, we are members of The Mighty Nein.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I knew it, I knew it! (laughs) Oh, this is a gracious day. Very well. Welcome to the real Evening Nip. Pleasure to have you, each and every one of you. I've seen you around upstairs, wandering and skulking a bit. I didn't know you were part of this mighty troupe."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, I hang out with them, but I actually like the drinks here a lot, so.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Make an insight check for Jester, and you make an insight check as well, since you were both keeping a close eye on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Go ahead and roll a d6, and keep that secret alongside that die. "Do you wish to raise?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You first.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I raised first last time. I'm offering you the chance to raise if you'd like."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Funny how that works. No, I'm good where I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Interesting. I'll raise another 50 gold."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh god.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sounds good. 50 it is.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go ahead and roll a d4. He's holding his cards in his hand, looks across at you, looks all throughout the room. "Well, Fjord, looks like it's time to call."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What, we're not going to bet again? (silence)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Puts another 100 gold on the table.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let's make it 150.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (mutters) That's all the money I have.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Have we seen anything suspicious from the deals, or the--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Jester) Jester wants you to know that from home she is watching The Gentleman and making sure he is not cheating.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Right, which helped tremendously because we use the sewers quite often. That had become an issue with some of our transference in the subterranean sewers of the city. And unfortunately, the underworks themselves have been a bit clogged as of late. So thank you for that. And one of our compatriots--" and he points up to one of the balconies on the side, and you can see, behind the individual that had the rifle, you see Kara, the half-elf.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's the first thing we've ever won. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As soon as you reveal the cards there's a (gasp). A gasp in the room and The Gentleman, his muscles tense for a second and he goes, (laughs) "Well-played and well earned! Take the coin, it's yours."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. Nice hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good to know that we have luck on your side as well. That's very important to me with people I do business with. So (clears throat) you have some balls throwing down that change and going into a game with me, I like that. So what can our many gifts and my associates present to you? What are your strengths? What are your skills? I've heard you've done some deeds. I've heard you killed some terrible creature in the sewers, is that correct?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We did. Yes. We fought and killed a giant spider of sorts.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "That's fine. We'll see how long Sutan stays in there, he has his ways. Depending on how strong a case you've left behind, and a little finagling on our end, if our partnership grows mutually beneficial, perhaps we could push that over the edge for him, and keep him away for quite some time. Now apparently I've also heard they're still seeking the murderers of the High-Richter. Particularly a purple-skinned tiefling who was spotted not far from the home that night, with rather ostentatious clothing. As well as a wandering dark-skinned youth, a woman with physical capability. So that doesn't bode well for you, does it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is that the goliath?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is the goliath he refers to.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorad?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Sorah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Que Sorah, Sorah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait the goliath or the ogre?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The goliath.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The mohawk lady.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're very strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very good."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: As you can see, Yasha is very strong.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, you've caused enough chaos in the Tri-Spire. You brought down one of the more corrupt, though strangely uncorruptible from our end, politicians we've seen. And from what I hear, Lord Sutan is already in chains." (chuckles)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (quickly) We don't know anything about that. We had nothing to do with it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nott, I think--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: She's quick to toe the party line.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Let's say I've lived and worked a solid 15 years orchestrating the seedy underbelly of this entire city. I've never been caught, I've never been arrested, and I thrive on a pile of gold and riches you can only begin to imagine."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: This is most intriguing. I hope we would be able to interview your previous compatriots. We'd like to know what they saw before, what we might expect.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. By all means. Do we have a deal?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: To clear our name here in Zadash?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How do we know that you can clear our name? We've proven to you that we're lucky. You know our reputation. We don't know anything about you.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "The sooner the better, because we can begin opening that line. We've now two weeks and three shipments lost."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) "Good, good. I like it."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I will say the only thing that I can think of that I would want, not even necessarily addend to this contract, if we are going to do this to you; I'm looking to stay on the down low in general. If we can agree, even my presence in this city necessarily is, as far as it's concerned, is none of anybody's concern outside this bar. I would be forever grateful.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We deal well in secrecy, my friend."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I figured you would.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Lucien, was it?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) "Very well."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Sir, I couldn't help but hear that this is about a mile outside of the city. Is that correct?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Correct."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are you operating on any sort of a timeline? Might we have a little bit of lenience with how quickly we get this dealt with?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "If you've proven yourself trustworthy enough, in the long term, perhaps. But understand that this is just a precaution. Who's to know? Perhaps things go sour in a few months. I want to make sure you don't double cross me and send the guard down."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Figured you might.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "So you do this deed, we'll consider it part of your gift."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Outstanding. I think we have a deal, do we not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I find all of this very agreeable.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Good, very good, quiet one. Now we have access to the tunnels. Of course we'll have to blindfold you to bring you through the underworks to the tunnel that leads to this underground river, when you decide to leave. Just because there's a lot of secrets down here, and we're still building our trust. But come back in whenever you're ready. We'll be happy to escort you and send you on your way."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Outstanding.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How long do you keep our blood for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, as long as we have our arrangements."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: But we get it back when we're done? Or we decide not to work with you anymore?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Look, you can come by and sass me all you fucking want. I've been here for two years. You newcomers walk in here and think you're all tough shit! You think it's so great? Go! Go in there! Come back!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let me get this straight. A bunch of fucking floating lights came out of the wall, gave your boy a little static shock, and you ran?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They both look at each other and look at the halfling. The halfling's like, "I wasn't going to stay behind!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Well, they're calling in the big leaguers now, so we'll take it from here. Your way up and down those stairs you mentioned, you get tripped up along the way, or was it just easy sailing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Any traps?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "We didn't go into the bottom chamber. That looked ominous enough. We stuck to the top one."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What about it was ominous?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's just a big octagonal dome chamber. Had this faint purple-ish glow on the inside-- "

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you afraid of geometry? I don't--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Scared of school.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Old terrors.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "That wasn't planned by anyone. If anything, it might have saved our asses, because it made what you did small potatoes by comparison. I'm thankful it happened, but look, those things continue to attack us from the eastern border, and from what little information's coming through, it's getting worse with each passing week, so the last thing I want to do is let any more of them into our backyard."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look, I deceived no one, outside of what you needed to know. We got our business done. I've done nothing wrong."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much of this was orchestrated from the beginning? Were we a distraction for the bigger picture?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What do you mean?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The attack on the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, the Crick attack on the tower? No, had nothing to do with us. We're not going to work with those savage beasts."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I was looking at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 21. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bring it to me!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Still need a whisper corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Ashley, Ashley's back, Ashley's back in the game, she's back in the game and she's never going back and Blindspot is no more. Well, maybe it is, we're just not sure, we're waiting to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (singing) We're waiting to find out, but I'll be here for a minute now. Back to the game.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "That wasn't planned by anyone. If anything, it might have saved our asses, because it made what you did small potatoes by comparison. I'm thankful it happened, but look, those things continue to attack us from the eastern border, and from what little information's coming through, it's getting worse with each passing week, so the last thing I want to do is let any more of them into our backyard."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Look, I deceived no one, outside of what you needed to know. We got our business done. I've done nothing wrong."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: How much of this was orchestrated from the beginning? Were we a distraction for the bigger picture?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What do you mean?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The attack on the tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, the Crick attack on the tower? No, had nothing to do with us. We're not going to work with those savage beasts."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Insight check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I was looking at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 21. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Bring it to me!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Still need a whisper corner.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Ashley, Ashley's back, Ashley's back in the game, she's back in the game and she's never going back and Blindspot is no more. Well, maybe it is, we're just not sure, we're waiting to find out.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (singing) We're waiting to find out, but I'll be here for a minute now. Back to the game.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: There you go! Always skirting that edge. I lived that life for three years.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Any favorite parts?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Eh, no."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hate those. Pictures good?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "There aren't any pictures."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck are you reading it for, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (clears throat) "Anyway."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Your Grog is showing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, sorry. Listen, everybody gets 104 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 104 gold?!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yep, and three silver.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 104 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No, not you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Not yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Fuck off. I was there in spirit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How many silver? What did you say?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Three silver.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This is a good time to mention that in between last game and this--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: --cantrips not--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can buy cantrip scrolls, but not--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Right, but Caleb would have known that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: After Liam had asked the DM.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. You cannot transcribe cantrips.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So we're switching out that cantrip for Hold Person, if that was at the store.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. Yeah, it was. And paid the difference.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And Caleb is flat broke. Until right now!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: And also, there's only a couple minutes more left on the spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Get out the black light.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I tried to cover them, but they wouldn't take ink. So I just did my best.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're not tattoos?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No. I don't know what they are.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They're just markings?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: But you don't remember getting them? They just appeared?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They were just there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Jester) "(clears throat) Caleb, I have a question."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You don't have to do every one of these that's she's going to fucking write.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Jester) "Do you shave your butt?" (as Caleb) I can truthfully say--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, that was for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: But now that you bring it up, because I'd never occurred to it, I might start.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That was to Caleb.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that was for Caleb. Never mind, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: No, that's very interesting. Good to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Now you know that neither Molly nor I shave our butt.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Who butt shaves?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And also there's not a lot of hair there anyway, so.

payload.raw_text: Not yet? Okay. Anybody else? Anything? All right then. As the morning comes to, you all wake up relatively early because you went to bed relatively early. It's shortly after sunrise. You find yourself conscious. Some of the first to really hit the downstairs tavern for breakfast. Food is served, drinks are had and the morning and day is yours. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: The one that you took from Yasha.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Not yet? Okay. Anybody else? Anything? All right then. As the morning comes to, you all wake up relatively early because you went to bed relatively early. It's shortly after sunrise. You find yourself conscious. Some of the first to really hit the downstairs tavern for breakfast. Food is served, drinks are had and the morning and day is yours. What do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Undead orbs.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That haunt swamps, haunt areas where they seek life force to siphon it and devour it. They're will-o'-wisps.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: They're basically will-o'-wisps. You usually find them in swamps or things like that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Do you know how to fight them?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Am I smoldering?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You are. (chuckles)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes. It's so good. It's a good movie.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know. Anyway. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We'll turn in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you guys all turn in?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. An evening's rest takes you as you all take a while, ruminating on the events of the day, the information acquired and the path before you. You eventually find yourselves to sleep so you can take your long rests for the night. Are you doing anything with the sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: With the sword?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The one-- you mean the--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The one that you took from Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Are you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Not yet.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "All righty." Comes out. "I've got two vials of holy water remaining. Those will run you about 25 gold pieces apiece if you want them."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're probably going to be dealing with some restless spirits actually, so if there's anything to deal with some of these phantasmagorical creatures, will-o'-wisps, that sort of thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, interesting. You're going to be dealing with some of the spiritual realm, you say?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, inevitably.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Let's see. Pretty sure I got maybe a vial or two of holy water if that's what you're looking for. That's not usually my purview, but we keep a couple in stock just in case. Let me see what I can muster." Goes ahead and rummages through in the back. You hear more metal and glass clanking and one box gets shifted off to the side. "Ah, dang nabbit."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, do you have any healing potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I don't. That's actually-- I wanted to get some. Let's see. Just want to double check to see if I do.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Those will put you back about 50 gold pieces apiece since we have the friendly discount of repeated customers. Isn't that right, one of-- me's?" One of the Pumats goes, "That's correct. They've been in here a few times." He's like, "All right. Great. Thank you for looking out there, buddy. All right. So--"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All righty." Comes out. "I've got two vials of holy water remaining. Those will run you about 25 gold pieces apiece if you want them."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Perfect. That's exactly what I was looking for was two vials of holy water.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, look at that. It's like it was meant to be. Straight up destiny."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Probably need some healing potions or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Do you have some healing potions?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Ah, well you see, funny thing with all of these adventurers, keep coming in and clearing me out. We got maybe two more, but you got to give us time to restock. You guys, your friends here have been mighty hungry."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Well, they're the Mighty Nein. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, that head shake afterwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Her initial regret.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The bail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Immediate nope. Nah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How much are they?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Well." You watch the demeanor shift a little bit from like the "I'm busy." Like "Well, happy to see a big spender coming on first thing in the morning." You start seeing more of the connection with the other Pumats.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god, that head shake afterwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Her initial regret.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The bail.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Immediate nope. Nah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: How much are they?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Those will put you back about 50 gold pieces apiece since we have the friendly discount of repeated customers. Isn't that right, one of-- me's?" One of the Pumats goes, "That's correct. They've been in here a few times." He's like, "All right. Great. Thank you for looking out there, buddy. All right. So--"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm really glad to hear that friendly discount's getting even friendlier. That really nice cloak you have on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yep?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How much is that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Oh, you're referring to that protection cloak. Let's see here." (grunts) Takes it off the counter, checks it. "That'll run you back about 800 gold pieces."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I fell face first into some coin recently. I think I'll take that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Whoa!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Great. Then we'll wait an hour after your passage forward and send your contraband on his way to safety with two individuals to escort him and lead him to civilization beyond the outskirts. Sound fair?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well. And you would wish this smuggling to head where? Our cleanest, to be fair, our cleanest means of smuggling out would be actually through the river after you pass through, as that leads us to the northern swamps of Berleben. And that would be probably one of the safest spaces still easily able to keep him out of sight and to a safe space out of the Crownsguard's watch."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Outstanding. We defer to your expertise.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. They'll walk by you and occasionally look. One of them will stop and inspect and move on. No one seems to fuck with you at the minute because you're with Kara. In fact, one of them seems to get close to you and looks and sees Dweez and goes (ugh) and just moves on. You do hear a noise, a strange like (guttural animal snorting) and you hear (whip crack) (animal grunting) echoing down the hall. You move around one spot and there's one archway that Frumpkin passes by, looking down, and you can see there's a pit, and there are a number of cages set up in there, about four of them, that have different creatures inside. It's too low-lit for Frumpkin to really see from this distance what's in there, but one of them is currently having a bit of a conniption fit and you see three cloaked figures that are on the outside. One of them is trying to whip elements of it that are coming at it; the other one is trying to prod it in the sides and it's getting agitated.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (snaps fingers) Frumpkin back in.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Frumpkin back in.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 50 feet behind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right. You can see this a bit. These are tight, individual tunnels. It feels almost like a mine in the fact that it has occasionally a wood structure for support between it. A lot of it is packed with earth that's been carved out. Eventually you'll split off into two and you'll see what looks to be a small resting chamber with another set of tables and a bunk. You go past another area and there's occasional torchlight set up on parts of the wall. You can see a couple of shifty individuals that are in the process of stacking crates somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's other people down here doing shit as we walk by.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We've been here for three hours!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Jester) "I grab the edge of the boat, and I say: Oskar! Is there no echo?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (echoing) Oskar!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: (as Jester) "That was pretty good!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys head deeper into the subterranean tunnels towards your destination, weapons at your side, prepared for whatever comes in the near future--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: God damn, he's going to end the game!

preceding_turns.speaker: ALL
preceding_turns.text: No!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're going to go ahead and end tonight's game.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Damn it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We don't have Laura here. We've had two episodes that went four plus hours. My back's hurting a little.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Four more hours! Mimosas!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The people marathoning right now will be grateful to hear that.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Come on!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: And you have a holy water now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like playing a video game for 30 minutes. It's so unsatisfying!
